lean_install_blocked_reason: Runner sandbox blocks execution of arbitrary binaries (e.g. elan-init from /tmp or /home/runner). curl downloads work. elan-init cannot be executed. Task 3 deferred until runner allows binary execution.

targets.name: ArgumentArity
targets.notes: Informal spec extracted and merged (PR #7799). 14 properties across 4 groups. Open question: constructor does not enforce Min <= Max; CommandLineOption constructor validates this. Next: Task 3 (Lean 4 formal spec). Blocked by Lean toolchain unavailability in CI runner.

targets.name: CommandLineParser.TryUnescape
targets.notes: Informal spec extracted (PR #7833, open). 24 properties across 5 groups. Two confirmed bugs: (1) single-char input '\'' causes ArgumentOutOfRangeException; (2) single-char input '"' causes range exception. Fix: add length<2 guard. Next: Task 3 (Lean 4 formal spec).

targets.name: TreeNodeFilter.MatchFilterPattern
targets.notes: NEW (2026-04-26). Pure recursive Boolean filter evaluator. Models Boolean algebra (And, Or, Not, Nop). Properties: De Morgan, double negation, idempotence, NopExpression=true. Abstract match predicate. Ideal for structural induction. Best Lean target after ArgumentArity.

targets.name: ResponseFileHelper.SplitCommandLine
targets.notes: NEW (2026-04-26). Pure tokeniser. State machine: seeking (TokenStart/WordEnd) x seekingQuote (QuoteStart/QuoteEnd). Properties: empty->empty, whitespace splits, double-quotes group and strip. Derived from dotnet/command-line-api.

targets.name: CommandLineParser.ParseOptionAndSeparators
targets.notes: Pure inner function. Splits --opt=val into name+arg. Strips leading dashes.

targets.name: CommandLineOptionsValidator arity validation
targets.notes: ValidateOptionsArgumentArity function. Arity bounds checking. First branch (arity > Max && Max == 0) is a special case of third branch — intentional for UX (different error message).

merged_prs.title: [Lean Squad] feat: formal verification infrastructure — research & CI automation

open_prs.title: [Lean Squad] feat(fv): Task 2 — informal spec for CommandLineParser.TryUnescape
[Lean Squad] feat(fv): Task 1 — expand FV targets (SplitCommandLine + TreeNodeFilter)

next_priority: Task 3: Write Lean 4 formal spec for ArgumentArity (phase 2 -> 3). Blocked by Lean toolchain. If Lean becomes available, start with ArgumentArity.lean using plan in lean_formal_spec_plan.

approach.rationale: Pure functions, clear algebraic properties, well-documented POSIX/CLI conventions. TreeNodeFilter added for Boolean algebra richness.

findings.description: Constructor does not enforce Min <= Max invariant. Ill-formed arities silently accepted. CommandLineOption constructor acts as the practical guard.
EC-1: Input of exactly one single-quote character triggers ArgumentOutOfRangeException: IndexOf(char, 1, -1) called when input.Length == 1, count = input.Length - 2 = -1.
findings.fix: Add length < 2 guard before quoted-mode branching

findings.description: EC-2: Input of exactly one double-quote character triggers range exception: input[1..^1] where start=1 > end=0 when input.Length == 1.
findings.fix: Add length < 2 guard before quoted-mode branching

lean_formal_spec_plan.structure: structure ArgumentArity where min : Int; max : Int
lean_formal_spec_plan.approach: Use Int for min/max. Model Int32.MaxValue as 2147483647. Use decide for concrete theorems.
